summary: 12 film announcements, 6 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Forgotten Island
film.announcement: DreamWorks animated film with Lea Salonga cast as main villain. Creators discuss their love letter to Filipino culture.

film.title: Monster Mia
film.announcement: Set for coordinated 2,700-screen Halloween release across Europe.

film.title: Berlinweh – Yearning for a Home
film.announcement: Marlene Dietrich biopic with Agnieszka Holland attached to direct.

film.title: Twisted
film.announcement: Upcoming indie animated feature with Lino DiSalvo involved in animation production.

film.title: Summoner
film.announcement: Kevin Bacon cast in horror thriller from Jeremy Slater.

film.title: Steps
film.announcement: Netflix animation feature sneak peeked at Annecy, focusing on Cinderella's so-called evil sisters.

film.title: Mio
film.talent: Jonathan Berlin (director, feature debut), Taddeo Kufus, Barbara Auer, Godehard Giese (cast)
film.announcement: German actor Jonathan Berlin's directorial feature debut with ensemble cast announced.

film.title: Taste of Water
film.announcement: Animated documentary on Japan's sake culture from Supersub and Toonz Media Group.

film.title: Monkey Quest
film.announcement: Japan-U.S. animation collaboration from Toei Animation showcased at Annecy.

film.title: Kung Fu Soccer
film.announcement: Stephen Chow's Shaolin Soccer spinoff lands worldwide distribution rights deal.

film.title: I Know Who You Are
film.announcement: China Lion takes Feng Xiaogang's film for North American distribution.

film.title: Rogue Trooper
film.announcement: Independent comic book adaptation directed by Duncan Jones.

tv.title: Possession
tv.announcement: Limited series led by Gugu Mbatha-Raw set between Bristol and Jamaica.

tv.title: The Young Magicians
tv.talent: Nick Mohammed (creator/adapting from his books), Blink Industries (co-producer)
tv.announcement: Animated series from Ted Lasso star Nick Mohammed's Young Magicians kids books with BBC Studios and Blink Industries.

tv.title: Anon Pls
tv.announcement: DeuxMoi adaptation series cancelled; Ryan O'Connell confirms project 'is over' and did not move forward.

tv.title: The Circle
tv.announcement: Michelle Buteau will not return as host for Hulu's reboot of The Circle.

tv.title: Please Hag
tv.announcement: South Korean webtoon adaptation with Passion Paris joining ADN for production.

tv.title: The Traitors: Anywhere
tv.announcement: WhatsApp-based game launched allowing fans to play The Traitors at home.
